name: Marbled Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch square pan and set aside.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
4. Melt the chocolate with the butter. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Beat the eggs until foamy. Add the sugar and vanilla extract. Continue beating until light lemon-colored.
6. Beat in the chocolate mixture, then stir in the dry ingredients.
7. Set aside 3/4 cup of the batter for later use.
8. To the remaining batter, stir in half a cup of chopped walnuts. Spread this into the prepared pan.
9. In another bowl, beat the cream cheese with the butter until smooth. Add the vanilla extract and sugar, then beat until fluffy.
10. Beat in the egg. Spread the cheese mixture over the chocolate layer.
11. Place heaping tablespoons of the reserved 3/4 cup chocolate batter over the cheese to form about 8 or 9 mounds.
12. Using a small spatula or knife, cut through the mounds in a zigzag pattern, almost but not quite through the bottom.
13. Sprinkle with the remaining chopped walnuts.
14. Bake for 35 minutes. Let stand at room temperature for a few hours before cutting.
Makes 24 brownies.
